They call me Cyrus — Artist. Writer. Mentor.

I guide courageous Black men and women toward emotional sovereignty and intentional living after trauma.

For over 16 years, I’ve walked my own path of healing from the deep wounds of childhood and adult trauma. Now, I help individuals like you reclaim emotional control, set healthy boundaries, and build authentic relationships with self and others. that reflect who you truly are.

This is the work—uncovering your emotional blocks, developing resilience, and cultivating your inner strength to live life on your terms.

I only work with a small number of committed clients who are ready to face their pain and transform their lives. Because of this, spaces are always limited and offered through a waitlist.

Take the next step.

Whether you’re a man breaking free from emotional neglect and redefining how you lead and love, or a woman breaking free from holding everything together and setting boundaries that honor who you truly are—this journey is yours.

Join my newsletter for access to insights and to be the first to know when coaching spots become available.
